title: The quest to measure our relationship with nature
description: As a movement, environmentalism has been pretty misanthropic. Understandably so—we humans have done some destructive things to the ecosystems around us. description: Last week, news outlets reported that Microsoft was pausing carbon removal purchases. It was something of a bombshell. The thing is, Microsoft is the carbon removal market. title: DeepL, known for text translation, now wants to translate your voice
description: DeepL says its tech could be used for real-time translation with meeting tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams

description: It wasn't the first time the surgeon cut out the wrong organ.

description: From inside a money-laundering center in Cambodia, an employee opens a popular Vietnamese banking app on his phone. title: AI Slop Is Making the Internet Fake-Happy
description: A new study examines the impact of the rise of AI-generated websites on the internet—and found some surprising results.

title: The Deepfake Nudes Crisis in Schools Is Much Worse Than You Thought
description: An analysis by WIRED and Indicator found nearly 90 schools and 600 students around the world impacted by AI-generated deepfake nude images—and the problem shows no signs of going away.
